notes: Items on the bus — dropped objects, the dashboard stash, things from the underseat pile.

dropped_glove.title: Dropped Glove
dropped_glove.flavor: A single glove. Brown leather. Has been here for a week.

small_notebook.title: Small Notebook
small_notebook.flavor: A small spiral notebook with three pages of grocery lists.

foreign_coin.title: Foreign Coin
foreign_coin.flavor: A coin from a country whose name you don't immediately recognize.

candy_dish_road.title: Road Candy
candy_dish_road.flavor: Hard candies in a dish on the dashboard. The good kind.

granola_bar.title: Granola Bar
granola_bar.flavor: A bar Cora keeps for the passengers who need one.

paper_schedule.title: Paper Schedule
paper_schedule.flavor: The current paper schedule. For the lost passengers.

passenger_duffel.title: Passenger Duffel
passenger_duffel.flavor: A small duffel left in the overhead. Tag has a name.

dropped_scarf.title: Dropped Scarf
dropped_scarf.flavor: A wool scarf the color of evening.

transfer_ticket.title: Transfer Ticket
transfer_ticket.flavor: A pink transfer that lets a passenger ride the next bus.

fare_change.title: Fare Change
fare_change.flavor: A handful of quarters from the fare box.
